name: ai-solution-planning-suite
description: Detachable AI solution planning suite for model selection, prompt architecture, RAG, memory, learner profiles, adaptive coaching, AI technical architecture, and AI solution review.

interface.shortDescription: Plans governed AI product capabilities and architecture.
interface.longDescription: A detachable suite for turning AI-heavy PRD scope into AI capability maps, model selection plans, prompt systems, RAG architecture, memory design, learner profiles, adaptive coaching logic, AI service architecture, and AI quality reviews.
defaultPrompt: Plan the AI solution for this PRD.
Design model, prompt, RAG, memory, and evaluation architecture.
Review this AI product design for safety, cost, and quality risks.
